title: WeBuild – Contact Person (ContactPerson) – SD-JWT VC payload
description: Schema for the SD-JWT VC payload of a ContactPerson attestation as defined in the ContactPerson Rulebook (Chapter 3.2). This models the JSON claims set prior to SD-JWT disclosure/packing.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type. Base type is 'eu.we-build.contactperson.1'.

attestation_legal_category.description: The legal category of the attestation as defined by eIDAS 2.

issuing_entity.description: The identifier of the legal entity that issued the attestation. For Contact Person attestations this is typically the employing organization (self-issued EAA).

economic_operator.description: Identifier of the employing organization according to the European Business Wallet (EBW) framework. SHALL be a non-empty string uniquely identifying the employing legal entity. Examples include EUID (e.g., DE-HRB-123456) or VAT number (e.g., DE123456789).

given_name.description: Given name of the contact person. In the U.S., the first name of a Person. SHALL be a non-empty string. Semantic reference: https://schema.org/givenName.

family_name.description: Family name of the contact person. In the U.S., the last name of a Person. SHALL be a non-empty string. Semantic reference: https://schema.org/familyName.

role.description: Denotes a role that the contact person takes in the organization (e.g., sales, finance, quality, logistics). SHALL be a non-empty string describing the function within the organization. Semantic reference: https://www.w3.org/TR/vocab-org/.

employee_identifier.description: An alphanumeric identifier of the employee assigned by the employing organization. SHALL be a non-empty alphanumeric string unique within the organization.

email.description: An electronic address through which the contact person can be contacted. SHALL be a valid email address conforming to RFC 4021. Semantic reference: Core Public Organisation Vocabulary (CPOV) – https://joinup.ec.europa.eu/collection/cpov.

telephone.description: A telephone number through which the contact person can be contacted. If provided, SHALL conform to ITU-T E.164 including the country code prefix (e.g., +49123456789). Semantic reference: Core Public Organisation Vocabulary (CPOV) – https://joinup.ec.europa.eu/collection/cpov.

status.description: Status object per SD-JWT VC status-list mechanism. MUST be present when the technical validity period is greater than 24 hours.

type.description: Status mechanism type. For SD-JWT VC Status List this SHALL be 'status-list'.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential that contains the bitstring indicating revocation status.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring for this credential.

status_purpose.description: Purpose of the status entry. For ContactPerson attestation this SHALL be 'revocation'.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL at which a machine-readable version of the trust anchor used for verifying the ContactPerson attestation can be found or looked up.

schema_version.description: Version of the ContactPerson attestation schema used.

cnf.description: Confirmation claims per SD-JWT VC. Holder binding via JWK is recommended.

jwk.description: Public key bound to the holder.
